name: my-first-extension
description: My first TypeScript extension for Gemini CLI

scripts.copy-assets: cp gemini-extension.json dist/ && cp -r skills dist/ && cp -r commands dist/ && cp GEMINI.md dist/ && cp README.md dist/
scripts.distribute: npm run build && npm run copy-assets && sed -i '' 's|\${extensionPath}\${\/\}scripts\${\/\}launcher.js|\${extensionPath}\${\/\}index.js|g' dist/gemini-extension.json
